examples: She and Nancy roomed together at college.
I had roomed with him in New Haven when we were both at Yale Law School.
They found a little two-roomed flat to rent.
Richmond roomed with McCain one floor up, and Blair, Richmond, and McCain had all gone to Dudley High School.
In Knoxville he roomed with another outgoing engineering major who, like Mr. Saied, came from a highly educated Indian family.
